calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To: (1) Invalidate The Katherine Payne-Loudd Revocable Trust Dated April 14, 2023, (2) Impose Constructive Trust And For, (3)
Off Calendar Apr-23-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Natalie Laacke appeared via zoom for Niambi Lincoln (petitioner).
Milla Lvovich appeared via zoom for (objectors).

Discussion was held regarding the proper venue for this matter, that a related case is open in San Mateo County, and that by having two venues it may cause an inconsistent ruling. Matter has been ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
